---
title: "HM_figures"
author: "Abby Lewis"
date: "2026-01-20"
output: html_document
---

Load data and packages

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Load packages and functions
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
source("../analysis/hm_style.R")

# Load and format data
# GENX
part <- read_csv(here::here("processed_data", "L2- partitioned_and_gap_filled.csv")) %>%
  rename(DateTime = TIMESTAMP) %>%
  mutate(
    CH4_umol_m2_s = CH4_filled,
    CO2_umol_m2_s = NEE,
    DateTime = with_tz(DateTime, "EST"),
    MIU_VALVE = factor(MIU_VALVE,
      levels = chamber_levels[1:2],
      labels = chamber_labels2[1:2]
    ),
    date = as_date(DateTime)
  ) %>%
  filter(DateTime <= "2025-11-15") %>%
  filter(grepl("0.*[0-9]* º", MIU_VALVE))

# PHAU
phau <- read_csv(here::here("Raw_data", "from_tom.csv")) %>%
  rename(CH4_umol_m2_s = flux_ch4,
         DateTime = Time) %>%
  select(DateTime, CH4_umol_m2_s, chamber, collar, zone) %>%
  mutate(experiment = "Phrag experiment")

# SMARTX
st <- read_csv(here::here("Raw_data","smartx_treatments.csv"))
smartx <- read_csv(here::here("Raw_data","SMARTX CH4 and CO2 fluxes_2016-2025.csv")) %>%
  mutate(CH4_umol_m2_s = `CH4 flux (umol/m2/d)`/24/60/60,
         DateTime = as_datetime(paste0(as.Date(Date, format = "%m/%d/%Y")," 12:00:00"))) %>%
  left_join(st) %>%
  filter(Temp == 0,
         CO2 == 0,
         year(DateTime) %in% c(2025, 2024)) %>%
  select(DateTime, CH4_umol_m2_s, Veg, Transect) %>%
  mutate(experiment = "SMARTX experiment")

# Combine PHAU and SMARTX
discrete <- phau %>%
  mutate(relevant_treatment = zone) %>%
  bind_rows(smartx %>%
              mutate(relevant_treatment = Veg))
```

Plot

```{r}
part %>%
  ggplot()+
  geom_line(aes(x = DateTime, y = CH4_umol_m2_s, color = MIU_VALVE))+
  geom_point(aes(y = CH4_umol_m2_s, x = DateTime), fill = "pink", color = "maroon", 
             shape = 21, data = discrete)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "GENX chamber", values = c("lightblue", "darkblue"))+
  theme_hm+
  ggh4x::facet_nested_wrap(~experiment+relevant_treatment)+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())+
  ylab(expression(CH[4]~" flux (µmol"~m^-2~s^-1*")"))+
  theme(ggh4x.facet.nestline = element_line(colour = "grey70"))

ggsave(here::here("figures", "phrag_compare.jpg"))

part %>%
  ggplot()+
  geom_line(aes(x = DateTime, y = CH4_umol_m2_s, color = MIU_VALVE))+
  geom_point(aes(y = CH4_umol_m2_s, x = DateTime), fill = "pink", color = "maroon", 
             shape = 21, data = discrete)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "GENX chamber", values = c("lightblue", "darkblue"))+
  theme_hm+
  ylim(c(0, 0.02))+
  ggh4x::facet_nested_wrap(~experiment+relevant_treatment)+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())+
  ylab(expression(CH[4]~" flux (µmol"~m^-2~s^-1*")"))+
  theme(ggh4x.facet.nestline = element_line(colour = "grey70"))

ggsave(here::here("figures", "phrag_compare_zoomed.jpg"))
```
